authors: Gregory P. Perreault Seth C. Lewis Maxwell Ely a University of South Florida
raw_title: ChatGPT, Generative AI, and an Epistemic Opportunity for Journalistic Authority
title_en: ChatGPT, Generative AI, and an Epistemic Opportunity for Journalistic Authority
title_zh: ChatGPT、生成式人工智能与新闻权威的认知机遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨了像ChatGPT这样的生成式人工智能工具如何为新闻行业带来新的机遇，帮助记者和媒体机构重新建立和巩固他们的权威地位。文章认为，人工智能可以成为新闻工作者提升可信度和影响力的工具。
plain_summary_en: This paper explores how generative AI tools like ChatGPT create new opportunities for journalism to rebuild and strengthen its authority. It argues that AI can help journalists enhance their credibility and influence.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻权威的演变，特别是人工智能技术如何影响媒体信任和职业身份。
research_direction_en: Examining the evolution of journalistic authority in the digital age, particularly how AI technologies affect media trust and professional identity.
